rationale: Educ. Code §49.353 governs transitional boards of trustees for consolidated school districts. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 49.353. GOVERNANCE. (a) Until the initial trustees elected as provided by Subsection (b) have qualified and taken office, a district consolidated under this subchapter is governed by a transitional board of trustees
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns district consolidation governance, not property tax exemptions.
